description.value: The creature is a machine, whether a servitor, automaton, or other construct. It has a Machine trait value of X, which acts as armour against all damage not inflicted by Haywire weapons. The creature is immune to Fear, Pinning, Insanity, poison, disease, and any psychic power or effect that targets the mind. It cannot be Stunned. X represents the Machine armour value.

system.benefit: The creature is a machine. Gains X points of armour against all non-Haywire damage. Immune to Fear, Pinning, Insanity, poison, disease, and mind-affecting powers. Cannot be Stunned. X is the Machine armour value.
